description: Held-out anti-memorization control for the authored benchmark paper: train an elastic-net logistic regression model on adrenal Hallmark pathway scores and evaluate transfer to liver samples.
rationale: The public benchmark emphasizes families of transfer tasks, but this exact pathway-level cross-tissue pairing is suitable as a hidden-reference query that is unlikely to be memorized from high-level benchmark summaries.

hidden_reference_generation.note: Populate reference AUROC, confidence interval, and top pathway coefficients after an independent benchmark-author run.
